characters.name: KYLE
characters.personality: Kyle is a protective and resourceful individual who prioritizes the safety of others, driven by a sense of duty and responsibility.
characters.appearance: Kyle is a ruggedly handsome man in his mid-30s, dressed in a worn leather jacket and jeans, with a sharp jawline and piercing eyes.
characters.style_reference: Dark, gritty cyberpunk, neon-lit cityscapes, and a muted color palette with flashes of high-tech gadgetry.

dialogue_samples.line: "We're running out of time, Maya. Our source just confirmed that the data disk has been sold to a rival corporation."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of KYLE, expression intense and focused.

dialogue_samples.line: "Be careful, Maya. We don't know what we're up against."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of MAYA, her eyes scanning the room with intensity.

dialogue_samples.line: "And what's the plan, Maya? You're not going in alone."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of MAYA, her voice low and confident.

dialogue_samples.line: "You stay behind me. I've got your back."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of MAYA, her eyes locked on the warehouse entrance.

characters.name: MAYA
characters.personality: Determined and resourceful, Maya is driven by a strong sense of justice, willing to take risks to uncover the truth and take down rival corporations.
characters.appearance: Maya is a tall, athletic woman in her mid-30s with short dark hair, wearing functional and versatile clothing suitable for her detective work.
characters.style_reference: Neon-lit, high-tech thriller, futuristic underground settings with a blend of dark and neon colors.

dialogue_samples.line: "Don't worry, Kyle. I'll track down that disk. I have a lead on a underground market."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of KYLE, frustration evident on his face.

dialogue_samples.line: "Alright, I think I found the seller. He's a known associate of the rival corporation."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of MAYA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue_samples.line: "I have a buyer lined up. I'll make the exchange and then we can take down the rival corporation."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of KYLE, his eyes scanning the market with a mixture of concern and curiosity.

dialogue_samples.line: "Alright, Kyle. Let's get this over with."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of MAYA, expression intense and focused.
Medium shot of KYLE, his voice steady and reassuring.
